title: senecio muricatus
intro: Senecio muricatus, also known as the ragwort or Greek ragwort, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys, and its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senecio muricatus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered due to its potential toxicity.
